  • Method
com.newland.nsdk.core.api.internal.keymanager

Interface KeyManager

  • All Superinterfaces:
    Module

    public interface KeyManager
extends Module
    Provides the ability to manage keys in the PIN pad.

    How to get this module:

         KeyManager keyManager = (KeyManager)NSDKModuleManagerImpl.getInstance().getModule(ModuleType.KEY_MANAGER);

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods Deprecated Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      void clearSymmetricKeys()
      Clear all the symmetric keys whose IDs are range from 1 to 250.
      void commitAtomic(boolean isSuccessful)
      Commits the result of remote key loading.
      void deleteKey(Key key)
      Deletes a specified key.
      void generateAsymKey(AsymmetricKey dstKey, AsymAlgInfo asymAlgInfo)
      Generates asymmetric keys.
      void generateKey(KeyGenerateMethod method, AlgorithmParameters algorithmParameters, SymmetricKey srcKey, Key dstKey)
      Generates the key in PIN pad under the protection of specified symmetric key.
      void generateKey(KeyGenerateMethod method, AlgorithmParameters algorithmParameters, SymmetricKey srcKey, Key dstKey, byte[] additionalData)
      Generates the key in PIN pad under the protection of specified symmetric key.
      void generateKey(KeyGenerateMethod method, SymmetricKey srcKey, Key dstKey)
      Generates symmetric/asymmetric key in PIN pad under the protection of specified symmetric key with default algorithm parameters and IV.
      byte[] generateKeyWithAsymKey(KeyGenerateMethod method, AsymAlgorithmParameters algorithmParameters, AsymmetricKey srcKey, SymmetricKey dstKey)
      Generates symmetric key in PIN pad under the protection of specified asymmetric key.
      void generateKeyWithHKDF(KeyGenerateMethod method, AlgorithmParameters algorithmParameters, KDFInfo kdfInfo, SymmetricKey srcKey, Key dstKey)
      Generate keys with HKDF
      byte[] generateKeyWithSymmKey(KeyGenerateMethod method, AlgorithmParameters algorithmParameters, SymmetricKey srcKey, Key dstKey)
      Generate key with Symmetric key.
      byte[] generateTR34Random(int len)
      Generate random data for TR34 key block.
      byte[] getKeyInfo(KeyInfoID infoID, Key key)
      Gets key info.
      java.lang.String getKeyOwner()
      Gets key owner.
      SymmetricKey[] getSymmKeyInfoByID(byte id)
      Get detailed Symmetric key info by its id.
      java.util.Map<java.lang.Integer,java.lang.Integer> getSymmKeyNums()
      Gets the number of keys installed for each id.
      void increaseKSN(byte groupId)
      Deprecated. 
      Replaced by increaseKSN(SymmetricKey).
      void increaseKSN(SymmetricKey key)
      Increases DUKPT KSN.
      void initAtomic()
      Backs up keys.
      byte[] loadTrustedCert(boolean isCA, byte[] cert)
      Verifies Newland certificate and returns its public key.
      void processTR34KeyBlock(TR34EncodingMode encodingMode, AsymmetricKey asymmetricKey, SymmetricKey symmetricKey)
      Processes TR34 key block and generate key with target TR34 encoding mode.
      byte[] processTR34KeyBlock(TR34EncodingMode encodingMode, AsymmetricKey asymmetricKey, SymmetricKey symmetricKey, byte[] additionalData)
      Processes TR34 key block and generate key with target TR34 encoding mode.
      void resetCertStatus()
      Resets certificates that loaded before.
      void setKeyOwner(java.lang.String keyOwner)
      Sets the key owner of the keys that are going to be injected.

    • Method Detail

      • generateKey

        void generateKey(KeyGenerateMethod method,
                 SymmetricKey srcKey,
                 Key dstKey)
          throws NSDKException
        Generates symmetric/asymmetric key in PIN pad under the protection of specified symmetric key with default algorithm parameters and IV.
        • Cipher Mode: ECB
        • Padding Mode: NONE
        • IV: null

        Supports the following keys:

        • DES
        • AES
        • DUKPT
        • RSA
        • GISKE
        • TR31

        Note:

        • For DEV devices: KeyGenerateMethod.CLEAR can be used to load symmetric and asymmetric keys.
        • For PRO devices: the plain text key installation method is exclusively applicable to the installation of DATA/AUTH/ANY type asymmetric keys. KEY_DISTRIBUTION type asymmetric key must undergo verification of their public key certificate's legitimacy through the LoadTrustCert interface before they are permitted to be injected into the device in plain text.

        Example:

             SymmetricKey sourceKey = new SymmetricKey();
     SymmetricKey dstKey = new SymmetricKey();

     sourceKey.setKeyID((byte)1);
     sourceKey.setKeyType(KeyType.DES);
     sourceKey.setKeyUsage(KeyUsage.KEK);

     dstKey.setKeyID((byte)2);
     dstKey.setKeyType(KeyType.DES);
     dstKey.setKeyUsage(KeyUsage.DATA);
     dstKey.setKeyLen(16);
     dstKey.setKeyData(ISOUtils.hex2byte("253C9D9D7C2FBBFA253C9D9D7C2FBBFA"));

     try {
         keyManager.generateKey(KeyGenerateMethod.CIPHER, sourceKey, dstKey);
     } catch (NSDKException e) {
         // Handle the exception
     }
        Parameters:
        method - [Required] Key injection method. See KeyGenerateMethod.
        srcKey - [Required] The key to protect the target key. This can be null when the method is KeyGenerateMethod.CLEAR.
        • Default key type: KeyType.DES
        • Default key usage: KeyUsage.KEK
        • Default KCV mode: KCVMode.NONE
        dstKey - [Required] Target key to be generated in PIN pad.
          For symmetric key:
        • Default key type: KeyType.DES
        • Default key usage: KeyUsage.KEK
        • Default KCV mode: KCVMode.NONE
          For asymmetric key(Only support KeyGenerateMethod.CLEAR and KeyGenerateMethod.TR31 now):
        • Default key type: AsymKeyType.RSA
        • Default key usage: AsymKeyUsage.AUTH_DATA
        Throws:
        NSDKException

      • generateKey

        void generateKey(KeyGenerateMethod method,
                 AlgorithmParameters algorithmParameters,
                 SymmetricKey srcKey,
                 Key dstKey)
          throws NSDKException
        Generates the key in PIN pad under the protection of specified symmetric key.

        Supports the following keys:

        • DES
        • AES
        • DUKPT
        • RSA
        • GISKE
        • TR31

        Note:

        • For DEV devices: KeyGenerateMethod.CLEAR can be used to load symmetric and asymmetric keys.
        • For Pro devices: the plain text key installation method is exclusively applicable to the installation of DATA/AUTH/ANY type asymmetric keys. KEY_DISTRIBUTION type asymmetric key must undergo verification of their public key certificate's legitimacy through the LoadTrustCert interface before they are permitted to be injected into the device in plain text.

        Example:

             SymmetricKey sourceKey = new SymmetricKey();
     SymmetricKey dstKey = new SymmetricKey();

     byte[] iv = ISOUtils.hex2byte("1122334455667788");

     AlgorithmParameters algorithmParameters = new AlgorithmParameters();
     algorithmParameters.setPaddingMode(PaddingMode.ZEROS);
     algorithmParameters.setCipherMode(CipherMode.CBC);
     algorithmParameters.setIV(iv);

     sourceKey.setKeyID((byte)1);
     sourceKey.setKeyType(KeyType.DES);
     sourceKey.setKeyUsage(KeyUsage.KEK);

     dstKey.setKeyID((byte)2);
     dstKey.setKeyType(KeyType.DES);
     dstKey.setKeyUsage(KeyUsage.DATA);
     dstKey.setKeyLen(16);
     dstKey.setKeyData(ISOUtils.hex2byte("253C9D9D7C2FBBFA253C9D9D7C2FBBFA"));

     try {
         keyManager.generateKey(KeyGenerateMethod.CIPHER, algorithmParameters, sourceKey, dstKey);
     } catch (NSDKException e) {
         // Handle the exception
     }
        Parameters:
        method - [Required] Key injection method. See KeyGenerateMethod
        algorithmParameters - [Optional] Algorithm parameters, see AlgorithmParameters
        • Default cipher mode: CipherMode.ECB
        • Default padding mode: PaddingMode.NONE
        • IV is required when cipher mode is CipherMode.CBC
        srcKey - [Required] The key to protect the target key.
        • Default key type: KeyType.DES
        • Default key usage: KeyUsage.KEK
        • Default KCV mode: KCVMode.NONE
        dstKey - [Required] Target key to be generated in PIN pad.
          For symmetric key:
        • Default key type: KeyType.DES
        • Default key usage: KeyUsage.KEK
        • Default KCV mode: KCVMode.NONE
          For asymmetric key(Only support KeyGenerateMethod.CLEAR and KeyGenerateMethod.TR31 now):
        • Default key type: AsymKeyType.RSA
        • Default key usage: AsymKeyUsage.AUTH_DATA
        Throws:
        NSDKException

      • generateKey

        void generateKey(KeyGenerateMethod method,
                 AlgorithmParameters algorithmParameters,
                 SymmetricKey srcKey,
                 Key dstKey,
                 byte[] additionalData)
          throws NSDKException
        Generates the key in PIN pad under the protection of specified symmetric key.

        Supports the following keys:

        • DES
        • AES
        • DUKPT
        • RSA
        • GISKE
        • TR31

        Note:

        • For DEV devices: KeyGenerateMethod.CLEAR can be used to load symmetric and asymmetric keys.
        • For Pro devices: the plain text key installation method is exclusively applicable to the installation of DATA/AUTH/ANY type asymmetric keys. KEY_DISTRIBUTION type asymmetric key must undergo verification of their public key certificate's legitimacy through the LoadTrustCert interface before they are permitted to be injected into the device in plain text.

        Example:

             // Case 1: Load symmetric key
     SymmetricKey sourceKey = new SymmetricKey();
     SymmetricKey dstKey = new SymmetricKey();

     AlgorithmParameters algorithmParameters = new AlgorithmParameters();
     algorithmParameters.setCipherMode(CipherMode.ECB);

     sourceKey.setKeyID((byte)1);
     sourceKey.setKeyType(KeyType.DES);
     sourceKey.setKeyUsage(KeyUsage.KEK);

     dstKey.setKeyID((byte)2);
     dstKey.setKeyType(KeyType.DES);
     dstKey.setKeyUsage(KeyUsage.DATA);
     dstKey.setKeyLen(16);
     dstKey.setKeyData(ISOUtils.hex2byte("253C9D9D7C2FBBFA253C9D9D7C2FBBFA"));

     try {
         keyManager.generateKey(KeyGenerateMethod.CIPHER, algorithmParameters, sourceKey, dstKey);
     } catch (NSDKException e) {
         // Handle the exception
     }

     // Case 2: Load asymmetric key
     String certEnc = FileUtils.readFromAssets(context, "kms_enc.pem");
     byte[] certEncBuf = certEnc.getBytes();
     byte[] keyData;

     try {
         keyData = keyManager.loadTrustedCert(false, certEncBuf);
     } catch (NSDKException e) {
         // Handle the error
         return;
     }

     AsymmetricKey distributionKey = new AsymmetricKey();
     distributionKey.setKeyType(AsymKeyType.RSA);
     distributionKey.setKeyUsage(AsymKeyUsage.KEY_DISTRIBUTION);
     distributionKey.setKeyID((byte)3);
     distributionKey.setKeyData(keyData);
     distributionKey.setKeyLen(keyData.length);

     try {
         keyManager.generateKey(KeyGenerateMethod.CLEAR, null, null, distributionKey, certEncBuf);
     } catch (NSDKException e) {
         // Handle the error
     }
        Parameters:
        method - [Required] Key injection method. See KeyGenerateMethod
        algorithmParameters - [Optional] Algorithm parameters, see AlgorithmParameters
        • Default cipher mode: CipherMode.ECB
        • Default padding mode: PaddingMode.NONE
        • IV is required when cipher mode is CipherMode.CBC
        srcKey - [Required] The key to protect the target key.
        • Default key type: KeyType.DES
        • Default key usage: KeyUsage.KEK
        • Default KCV mode: KCVMode.NONE
        dstKey - [Required] Target key to be generated in PIN pad.
          For symmetric key:
        • Default key type: KeyType.DES
        • Default key usage: KeyUsage.KEK
        • Default KCV mode: KCVMode.NONE
          For asymmetric key(Only support KeyGenerateMethod.CLEAR and KeyGenerateMethod.TR31 now):
        • Default key type: AsymKeyType.RSA
        • Default key usage: AsymKeyUsage.AUTH_DATA
        additionalData - [Optional] Additional data. Usually when target key is asymmetric key, use this parameter to set certificate data.
        Throws:
        NSDKException

      • generateKeyWithHKDF

        void generateKeyWithHKDF(KeyGenerateMethod method,
                         AlgorithmParameters algorithmParameters,
                         KDFInfo kdfInfo,
                         SymmetricKey srcKey,
                         Key dstKey)
                  throws NSDKException
        Generate keys with HKDF

        Example:

             String sn = "Q28720000040";
     String salt = "Q123456";
     SymmetricKey srcKey = new SymmetricKey();
     srcKey.setKeyID((byte) 252);
     srcKey.setKeyType(KeyType.DES);
     srcKey.setKeyUsage(KeyUsage.KEK);

     SymmetricKey dstKey = new SymmetricKey();
     dstKey.setKeyID((byte) 2);
     dstKey.setKeyUsage(KeyUsage.KEK);
     dstKey.setKeyType(KeyType.DES);
     dstKey.setKeyLen(24);

     KDFInfo hkdfInfo = new KDFInfo();
     hkdfInfo.setKDFType(KDFType.HKDF);
     hkdfInfo.setMessageDigestType(MessageDigestType.SHA256);
     hkdfInfo.setInfo(sn.getBytes(StandardCharsets.US_ASCII);
     hkdfInfo.setSalt(salt.getBytes(StandardCharsets.US_ASCII);
     try {
             mKeyManager.generateKeyWithHKDF(KeyGenerateMethod.HKDF, null, hkdfInfo, srcKey, dstKey);
             showMessage("Generate Key With HKDF success.");
         }catch (NSDKException e) {
             e.printStackTrace();
         }
        Parameters:
        method - [Required] Key inject method.For now, only KeyGenerateMethod.HKDF is supported.
        algorithmParameters - [Optional] Algorithm parameters, see AlgorithmParameters
        • Default cipher mode: CipherMode.ECB
        • Default padding mode: PaddingMode.NONE
        • IV is required when cipher mode is CipherMode.CBC
        kdfInfo - [Required] KDF info, used as padding data for dstKey, see KDFInfo
        • Default KDF type: KDFType.HKDF
        • Default MessageDigestType: MessageDigestType.SHA256
        srcKey - [Required] BDK Key, the key to protect the target key.
          BDK Key parameters are restricted.
        • Key Type: KeyType.DES
        • Key Usage: KeyUsage.KEK
        • Key ID: BDK ID.
        dstKey - [Required] Target key to be generated with HKDF.
          Only used for Symmetric keys:
        • Key Type: KeyType.DES
        • Default Key Usage: KeyUsage.KEK
        • Key Length: 24
        • Key ID: User defined
        Throws:
        NSDKException

      • generateKeyWithAsymKey

        byte[] generateKeyWithAsymKey(KeyGenerateMethod method,
                              AsymAlgorithmParameters algorithmParameters,
                              AsymmetricKey srcKey,
                              SymmetricKey dstKey)
                       throws NSDKException
        Generates symmetric key in PIN pad under the protection of specified asymmetric key.

        Note:

        • For DEV devices: Only KeyGenerateMethod.CIPHER and KeyGenerateMethod.RANDOM_OUT are allowed.
        • For PRO devices: Only KeyGenerateMethod.RANDOM_OUT is allowed.

        Example:

             AsymmetricKey sourceKey = new AsymmetricKey();
     SymmetricKey dstKey = new SymmetricKey();

     AsymAlgorithmParameters algorithmParameters = new AsymAlgorithmParameters();
     algorithmParameters.setMessageDigestType(MessageDigestType.SHA256);
     algorithmParameters.setEncodingMode(AsymEncodingMode.PKCS_V15);

     sourceKey.setKeyID((byte)1);
     sourceKey.setKeyType(AsymKeyType.RSA);
     sourceKey.setKeyUsage(AsymKeyUsage.KEY_DISTRIBUTION);

     dstKey.setKeyID((byte)2);
     dstKey.setKeyType(KeyType.DES);
     dstKey.setKeyUsage(KeyUsage.TR31_KEK);
     dstKey.setKeyLen(24);

     try {
         byte[] keyData = keyManager.generateKeyWithAsymKey(KeyGenerateMethod.RANDOM_OUT, algorithmParameters, sourceKey, dstKey);
     } catch (NSDKException e) {
         // Handle the exception
     }
        Parameters:
        method - [Required] Key injection method. For now, only KeyGenerateMethod.CIPHER and KeyGenerateMethod.RANDOM_OUT are supported.
        algorithmParameters - Algorithm parameters, see AsymAlgorithmParameters
        • [Required] Message digest type
        • [Required] Encoding mode
        srcKey - [Required] The key to protect the target key.
        • Default key type: AsymKeyType.RSA
        • Default key usage: AsymKeyUsage.KEY_DISTRIBUTION
        dstKey - [Required] Target key be generated in PIN pad.
        • Default key type: KeyType.DES
        • Default key usage: KeyUsage.KEK
        • Default KCV mode: KCVMode.NONE
        Returns:
        When method is KeyGenerateMethod.RANDOM_OUT, random key will be generated and returned.
        Throws:
        NSDKException

      • generateAsymKey

        void generateAsymKey(AsymmetricKey dstKey,
                     AsymAlgInfo asymAlgInfo)
              throws NSDKException
        Generates asymmetric keys.

        For Example:

              try {
          //destination key info
          AsymmetricKey asymmetricKey = new AsymmetricKey();
          asymmetricKey.setKeyID((byte) 15);
          asymmetricKey.setKeyType(AsymKeyType.RSA);
          asymmetricKey.setKeyUsage(AsymKeyUsage.DATA);
          //Algorithm info
          AsymAlgInfo asymAlgInfo = new AsymAlgInfo();
          asymAlgInfo.setUnBit(2048);
          asymAlgInfo.setUcRSAPubExp(new byte[] {0x01, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x01});

          keyManager.generateAsymKey(asymmetricKey, asymAlgInfo);

      } catch(NSDKException e) {
          //handle exception
      }
        Parameters:
        dstKey - [Required] The asymmetric key to be generated, which keyUsage shall be AsymKeyUsage.AUTH or AsymKeyUsage.DATA.
        • Supported asymmetric key type:AsymKeyType.RSA
        • Supported asymmetric key usage:AsymKeyUsage.DATA or AsymKeyUsage.AUTH
        asymAlgInfo - [Required] The asymmetric algorithm info, see AsymAlgInfo
          `
        • unBit: Key size
        • ucRSAPubExp: RSA public key index, 5 bytes
        Throws:
        NSDKException

      • generateKeyWithSymmKey

        byte[] generateKeyWithSymmKey(KeyGenerateMethod method,
                              AlgorithmParameters algorithmParameters,
                              SymmetricKey srcKey,
                              Key dstKey)
                       throws NSDKException
        Generate key with Symmetric key.
        Parameters:
        method - [Required] The key generation method, see KeyGenerateMethod.
        algorithmParameters - [Optional] Algorithm parameters, see AlgorithmParameters
        • Default cipher mode: CipherMode.ECB.
        • Default padding mode: PaddingMode.NONE.
        • IV is required when cipher mode is CipherMode.CBC.
        srcKey - [Required] BDK Key, the key to protect the target key.
          BDK Key parameters are restricted.
        • Key Type: KeyType.DES
        • Key Usage: KeyUsage.KEK
        • Key ID: BDK ID.
        dstKey - [Required] Target key to be generated in PIN pad.
          For symmetric key:
        • Default key type: KeyType.DES
        • Default key usage: KeyUsage.KEK
        • Default KCV mode: KCVMode.NONE
        Returns:
        When method is KeyGenerateMethod.RANDOM_OUT, random key will be generated and returned.
        Throws:
        NSDKException

      • deleteKey

        void deleteKey(Key key)
        throws NSDKException
        Deletes a specified key.

        Example:

             SymmetricKey delKey = new SymmetricKey();
     delKey.setKeyID((byte)6);
     delKey.setKeyType(KeyType.DES);
     delKey.setKeyUsage(KeyUsage.DUKPT);
     try {
         keyManager.deleteKey(delKey);
     } catch (NSDKException e) {
         // Handle the exception
     }
        Parameters:
        key - [Required] Which key to delete.
        Throws:
        NSDKException

      • getKeyInfo

        byte[] getKeyInfo(KeyInfoID infoID,
                  Key key)
           throws NSDKException
        Gets key info.

        Example:

             // Get KSN
     DUKPTKey infoKey = new DUKPTKey();
     infoKey.setKeyID((byte)2);
     infoKey.setKeyType(KeyType.DES);
     infoKey.setKeyUsage(KeyUsage.DUKPT);
     try {
         byte[] ksn = keyManager.getKeyInfo(KeyInfoID.KSN, infoKey);
     } catch (NSDKException e) {
         // Handle the exception
     }

     // Get KCV
     SymmetricKey desKey = new SymmetricKey();
     desKey.setKeyID((byte)2);
     desKey.setKeyType(KeyType.DES);
     desKey.setKeyUsage(KeyUsage.DATA);
     try {
         byte[] kcv = mKeyManager.getKeyInfo(KeyInfoID.KCV, desKey);
     } catch (NSDKException e) {
         // Handle the exception
     }
        Parameters:
        infoID - [Required] What info to get. See KeyInfoID
        key - [Required] Which key's info to get.
        Returns:
        Key info.
        Throws:
        NSDKException

      • setKeyOwner

        void setKeyOwner(java.lang.String keyOwner)
          throws NSDKException
        Sets the key owner of the keys that are going to be injected.
        Parameters:
        keyOwner - [Required] Key owner which length is less than 256. If it is an empty string, it will clear key owner.
        Throws:
        NSDKException

      • getKeyOwner

        java.lang.String getKeyOwner()
                      throws NSDKException
        Gets key owner.
        Returns:
        Key owner.
        Throws:
        NSDKException

      • increaseKSN

        void increaseKSN(byte groupId)
          throws NSDKException
        Deprecated. Replaced by increaseKSN(SymmetricKey).
        Increases DES DUKPT KSN.
        Parameters:
        groupId - [Required]DES DUKPT group id. Value range: [1-250].
        Throws:
        NSDKException

      • generateTR34Random

        byte[] generateTR34Random(int len)
                   throws NSDKException
        Generate random data for TR34 key block.
        Parameters:
        len - The length of Random data.
        Returns:
        Random data for TR34 key block.
        Throws:
        NSDKException

      • processTR34KeyBlock

        void processTR34KeyBlock(TR34EncodingMode encodingMode,
                         AsymmetricKey asymmetricKey,
                         SymmetricKey symmetricKey)
                  throws NSDKException
        Processes TR34 key block and generate key with target TR34 encoding mode.
        Parameters:
        encodingMode - EncodingMode for TR34 key block, see TR34EncodingMode
        asymmetricKey - AsymmetricKey for Checking signature and decrypt.
        symmetricKey - Kn key information, TR34 Key Block set by setKeyData().
        Throws:
        NSDKException

      • processTR34KeyBlock

        byte[] processTR34KeyBlock(TR34EncodingMode encodingMode,
                           AsymmetricKey asymmetricKey,
                           SymmetricKey symmetricKey,
                           byte[] additionalData)
                    throws NSDKException
        Processes TR34 key block and generate key with target TR34 encoding mode. If the according mode will output block data, it will be set in the return block.
        Parameters:
        encodingMode - [Required] Encoding mode for TR34 key block, see TR34EncodingMode.
        asymmetricKey - [Required] AsymmetricKey for checking signature and decrypt key data.
        symmetricKey - [Required] The destination key, TR34 encryption key block shall be set by Key.setKeyData(byte[]).
        additionalData - [Optional] If the according encoding mode needs additional data, it will be set in this parameter area.
        Returns:
        The output data according to the encoding mode. It is not a necessary part.
        Throws:
        NSDKException

      • increaseKSN

        void increaseKSN(SymmetricKey key)
          throws NSDKException
        Increases DUKPT KSN.
        Parameters:
        key - [Required]Key. The following required:
        • Key ID, value range: [1-250].
        • Key type, see KeyType
        Throws:
        NSDKException

      • loadTrustedCert

        byte[] loadTrustedCert(boolean isCA,
                       byte[] cert)
                throws NSDKException
        Verifies Newland certificate and returns its public key.

        Note: This is usually used to verify Newland certificates of KDH(Key Distribution Host) during RKI(Remote Key Injection) process.

        Parameters:
        isCA - [Required] Indicates if it is CA certificate.
        cert - [Required] Newland certificate data.
        Returns:
        The public key of the certificate.
        Throws:
        NSDKException

      • resetCertStatus

        void resetCertStatus()
              throws NSDKException
        Resets certificates that loaded before.
          Note:
        • This is used to clear loaded KDH(Key Distribution Host) certificates before starting RKI(Remote Key Injection) process.
        • This shall be called before loadTrustedCert(boolean, byte[])
        Throws:
        NSDKException

      • initAtomic

        void initAtomic()
         throws NSDKException
        Backs up keys.

        This is usually called before loading keys and work with commitAtomic(boolean) to ensure that either all keys loaded, or no keys loaded.

        Throws:
        NSDKException

      • commitAtomic

        void commitAtomic(boolean isSuccessful)
           throws NSDKException
        Commits the result of remote key loading.
        Parameters:
        isSuccessful - [Required] The result of remote key loading.
        • true: All the keys are loaded successfully.
        • false: Error occurred during key loading, all of the keys that already loaded will be reversed.
        Throws:
        NSDKException

      • getSymmKeyNums

        java.util.Map<java.lang.Integer,java.lang.Integer> getSymmKeyNums()
                                                           throws NSDKException
        Gets the number of keys installed for each id.
        Returns:
        The number of keys installed for each id.
        Throws:
        NSDKException

      • getSymmKeyInfoByID

        SymmetricKey[] getSymmKeyInfoByID(byte id)
                           throws NSDKException
        Get detailed Symmetric key info by its id.
        Parameters:
        id - ID of the Symmetric key to be gained.
        Returns:
        Symmetric keys info.
        Throws:
        NSDKException

      • clearSymmetricKeys

        void clearSymmetricKeys()
                 throws NSDKException
        Clear all the symmetric keys whose IDs are range from 1 to 250.
        Throws:
        NSDKException
